findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "bodygraph" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Compute an Energy Blueprint (Human Design) chart from a UTC birth instant. Returns type, authority, strategy, profile, definition, incarnation cross, channels, …

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
